description: Accounts of the expenses for a maṭbakh (sugar refinery or kitchen), headed "al-maṣrūf fī maṣāliḥ al-maṭbakh al-mubārak." Dated: Jumādā II 632 AH = February/March 1235 CE. The beginnings of a couple of line items are preserved. Pinholes at the margin ~4mm apart.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
